llm_call_sites.name: synthesis_draft
llm_call_sites.description: prism_finalize draft phase - AI-generated finalization file drafts (session_log_entry, handoff_where_we_are, handoff_next_steps, handoff_session_history, task_queue_completed, task_queue_new)
llm_call_sites.frequency: 1 per finalize that uses draft or full; observed ~21 prism finalizes / 30 days (git log, prism repo); modeled 25-30 finalize-equivalents/month fleet-wide

resolved_transport_chain_live_env.selected_by: LLM_ROUTING_SYNTHESIS_DRAFT_PROVIDER=gemini via src/llm/routing-policy.ts:47,112-121; live because ENABLED=true, DRY_RUN=false, gemini in ALLOWED_PROVIDERS, GEMINI_API_KEY set (routing-policy.ts:64-90); executed FIRST at src/ai/client.ts:206-233 (isLiveProviderSynthesisDecision, src/llm/provider-adapters.ts:38-49); adapter src/llm/provider-adapters.ts:236-284
SYNTHESIS_DRAFT_TRANSPORT=cc_subprocess via src/ai/client.ts:89-134,235-270 after SYNTHESIS_PROVIDER_FALLBACK warn (client.ts:225-233); wrapper src/ai/cc-subprocess.ts:111-296
cc_subprocess failure fallback, src/ai/client.ts:256-269; API call src/ai/client.ts:351

llm_call_sites.input_assembly: 7 living docs (LIVING_DOCUMENT_NAMES minus architecture.md, glossary.md, intelligence-brief.md) + up to 50 session commit messages; prism repo measured at origin/main 7f445b5e: handoff 5673B + decisions/_INDEX 32652B + session-log 18817B + task-queue 29440B + eliminated 1973B + known-issues 37876B + insights 34886B = 161317B
llm_call_sites.thinking: hardcoded true (src/tools/finalize.ts:511); no SYNTHESIS_DRAFT_THINKING switch exists (computeSynthesisThinkingEnabled only accepts brief|pdu, src/config.ts:154-163)
validators: GAP: parse failure still returns success:true with raw_content + parse_warning (src/tools/finalize.ts:535-543) - not a hard failure today
provider-side finish_reason STOP guard (src/llm/provider-adapters.ts:261-264 gemini; :216-219 openai-compatible)
llm_call_sites.classification_reason: structured extraction/drafting from documents into a fixed JSON contract; chat-side Claude reviews and edits before commit, so a human-equivalent reviewer is always in the loop
llm_call_sites.verdict_reason: fixed-contract JSON drafting with a downstream reviewer; staged tonight in LLM_ROUTING_OPENROUTER_SITES (stage 1)
llm_call_sites.continuity_criticality: low (rank 3 of 3 among synthesis sites - chat reviews output before anything persists)

llm_call_sites.name: synthesis_brief
llm_call_sites.description: intelligence-brief.md generation - the session-to-session continuity carrier (D-44)
llm_call_sites.frequency: 1 per finalize + occasional manual regenerations; 34 auto-synthesized pushes (brief+pdu pairs) observed in prism repo over 30 days

resolved_transport_chain_live_env.selected_by: LLM_ROUTING_SYNTHESIS_BRIEF_PROVIDER=openai via src/llm/routing-policy.ts:47,112-121; live per routing-policy.ts:64-90; executed FIRST at src/ai/client.ts:206-233; adapter src/llm/provider-adapters.ts:143-185, url :341

llm_call_sites.input_assembly: shared bundle (SRV-73): 9 living docs (minus intelligence-brief.md) + 7 decision-domain files (synthesize.ts:140-148); prism repo measured pre-trim ~739KB (~211K est tokens) - EXCEEDS SYNTHESIS_INPUT_MAX_TOKENS=120000 (config.ts:204-205), deterministically trimmed to SYNTHESIS_INPUT_TARGET_TOKENS=60000 (config.ts:220-221) by src/ai/input-budget.ts on every prism finalize
llm_call_sites.output_contract: markdown, exactly 3 H2 sections (Project State / Risk Flags / Quality Audit), 1500-3000 token target (prompts.ts:34), EOF sentinel
llm_call_sites.max_tokens_citation: SYNTHESIS_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS, src/config.ts:169, applied at src/ai/client.ts:334 and src/llm/provider-adapters.ts:81
llm_call_sites.thinking: computeSynthesisThinkingEnabled('brief'), default true, env SYNTHESIS_BRIEF_THINKING (src/config.ts:154-163; passed at synthesize.ts:260)
validators: stop_reason=max_tokens + missing sections -> refuse to overwrite (src/ai/synthesize.ts:286-305)
messages_api refusal/empty guards (src/ai/client.ts:362-387); provider finish_reason/empty guards (src/llm/provider-adapters.ts:169-173,216-222)
llm_call_sites.classification_reason: non-interactive document synthesis against a fixed 3-section contract with deterministic server-side validators; the judgment component (summary quality) is measurable by morning artifact diff
llm_call_sites.verdict_reason: GLM-5.2 capability profile (1M ctx, top-decile agentic/summarization benchmarks) covers structured synthesis; highest continuity criticality so flip is stage 2, gated on operator morning-diff of intelligence-brief.md quality
llm_call_sites.continuity_criticality: highest (rank 1 of 3 - the continuity carrier; a bad brief degrades every subsequent session boot)

llm_call_sites.name: synthesis_pdu
llm_call_sites.description: pending-doc-updates.md generation - machine-applied proposals for architecture/glossary/insights (D-155/D-156)
llm_call_sites.frequency: 1 per finalize + occasional manual; same cadence as CS-2 (shared bundle, fired together via Promise.allSettled finalize.ts:1453-1456)

resolved_transport_chain_live_env.selected_by: LLM_ROUTING_SYNTHESIS_PDU_PROVIDER=anthropic -> currentAnthropicFallback (src/llm/routing-policy.ts:48-53,167-174) -> NOT a live provider decision -> SYNTHESIS_PDU_TRANSPORT=cc_subprocess serves (src/ai/client.ts:235-270)

llm_call_sites.input_assembly: identical shared bundle to CS-2 (byte-identical, SRV-73; synthesize.ts:435-441); post-trim ~60K est tokens on prism
llm_call_sites.output_contract: markdown, exactly 4 H2 sections (architecture.md / glossary.md / insights.md / No Updates Needed) in the apply-pdu machine grammar (prompts.ts:78-84 contract note), 1500-3500 token target (prompts.ts:139), EOF sentinel
llm_call_sites.thinking: computeSynthesisThinkingEnabled('pdu'), default true, env SYNTHESIS_PDU_THINKING (src/config.ts:154-163; passed at synthesize.ts:472)
validators: downstream parseProposals grammar gate in apply-pdu (prompts.ts:78-84; tests/pdu-prompt-parser-contract.test.ts) - malformed proposals are archived as rejected, never applied
llm_call_sites.classification_reason: output is machine-parsed by a strict grammar with automatic rejection of non-conforming proposals; insights proposals are operator-review-only by design
llm_call_sites.verdict_reason: grammar-gated machine output with rejection-safe downstream; staged tonight in LLM_ROUTING_OPENROUTER_SITES (stage 1); also frees CloudShift Max capacity currently consumed by the cc_subprocess PDU leg
llm_call_sites.continuity_criticality: medium (rank 2 of 3 - auto-applied at next finalize but grammar-gated and operator-visible)

llm_call_sites.name: x_sentiment
llm_call_sites.description: prism_x_sentiment - aggregate public X sentiment via xAI x_search server-side tool
llm_call_sites.frequency: on-demand only; not part of any automated flow

resolved_transport_chain_live_env.selected_by: requires LLM_ROUTING_X_SENTIMENT_ENABLED=true AND LLM_ROUTING_ENABLED=true AND LLM_ROUTING_DRY_RUN=false AND xai in ALLOWED_PROVIDERS AND XAI_API_KEY (x-sentiment.ts:377-393,89-111); no fallback chain - unavailable/error result on failure

llm_call_sites.input_assembly: fixed short system prompt + topic string (x-sentiment.ts:140-155); trivial input
llm_call_sites.output_contract: compact JSON with enum-validated sentiment/confidence/caveats + handle-free /i/status/ source URLs only (x-sentiment.ts:174-201,305-332)
llm_call_sites.thinking: n/a (Responses API with x_search; no thinking parameter sent)
validators: strict X status URL validation + handle stripping (x-sentiment.ts:305-332)
llm_call_sites.classification_reason: aggregate labeling into fixed enums; the capability is the xAI-exclusive x_search tool, not the LLM per se
llm_call_sites.verdict_reason: x_search is an xAI Responses-API exclusive server-side tool; GLM-5.2 via OpenRouter has no X search access, so migration is impossible without losing the tool that defines the call site

llm_call_sites.name: cc_dispatch
llm_call_sites.description: Claude Code dispatch - Agent SDK subprocess executing repo tasks (query/execute modes, sync/async)
invoking_flows: Trigger daemon brief execution (spawns claude CLI directly with the same OAuth credential; trigger repo has no direct LLM API calls - verified via git grep of origin/main src/)

resolved_transport_chain_live_env.selected_by: hard-walled: resolveRoute returns anthropic fallback for surface=cc_dispatch regardless of LLM_ROUTING_CC_DISPATCH_PROVIDER (src/llm/routing-policy.ts:55-57); isLiveProviderSynthesisDecision excludes the surface (src/llm/provider-adapters.ts:46)

llm_call_sites.input_assembly: task prompt + cloned repo context; agent-managed (multi-turn, maxTurns default 50, src/config.ts:539-542)
llm_call_sites.output_contract: DispatchResult {success, result, turns, usage, cost_usd} (claude-code/client.ts:67-88); PR/commits in execute mode
llm_call_sites.max_tokens_citation: n/a - agentic loop bounded by maxTurns and timeout, not max_tokens
validators: Trigger quality gates on output (tests/tsc/lint before PR - CLAUDE.md Trigger workflow)
llm_call_sites.classification_reason: autonomous multi-turn coding with repo mutation and PR authorship - the judgment tier by definition (D-275: Claude remains the judgment tier)
llm_call_sites.verdict_reason: protected boundary in code (routing-policy.ts:55-57) and in CLAUDE.md; a non-Claude provider name in LLM_ROUTING_CC_DISPATCH_PROVIDER must not redirect code dispatch - a GLM code-runner would be a separate subsystem, explicitly out of D-275 scope; billing is CloudShift subscription, not per-token API
llm_call_sites.continuity_criticality: n/a (writes gated by PR review + Trigger quality gates)

configured_but_inert_env.mechanism: double-gated: (1) no surface selects deepseek (requestedProvider reads only LLM_ROUTING_*_PROVIDER / LLM_ROUTING_DEFAULT_PROVIDER, routing-policy.ts:112-121; none names deepseek in live env), and (2) deepseek absent from LLM_ROUTING_ALLOWED_PROVIDERS so providerAllowed returns false (routing-policy.ts:123-130) -> liveInvocationAllowed=false (:69-72) -> isLiveProviderSynthesisDecision false (provider-adapters.ts:38-49) -> synthesizeViaProvider never invoked (client.ts:206). Registry entry exists since 8cdc489 (2026-06-25, dormant resolver PR #94); no commit ever wired a selector.
same double gate as deepseek: no surface selector, not in ALLOWED_PROVIDERS
read only for sanitized status display (route-status.ts:15,56); zero effect on route resolution (absent from routing-policy.ts)
surface never resolved in production code; excluded from live synthesis (provider-adapters.ts:45)
hard wall at routing-policy.ts:55-57; observeRoute in dispatchTask is log-only (claude-code/client.ts:261-268)
live openai/gemini provider routes execute FIRST (client.ts:206-233); the configured cc_subprocess transport serves only when the provider hop fails
govern only the cc_subprocess hop (client.ts:239); on the live provider hop the model comes from LLM_ROUTING_{OPENAI,GEMINI}_MODEL (routing-policy.ts:136-142)
zero references anywhere in src/ at 0b5d31b (grep 'openrouter' returns nothing); s196b implements the adapter + SITES activation
